title: Dashboard & Analytics page
description: Create dashboard landing page with metric cards (identities, profiles, verified count), identity growth chart (Recharts area chart), status distribution pie chart, recent activity table, and system status indicators. Replace empty redirect with real dashboard. See tasks/demo-dashboard-facilities-segments/specs/01-dashboard-analytics.md

title: Phase 9: End-to-end testing and verification
description: Perform manual testing of full face scanning flow, verify database records created, test edge cases (camera denial, service down, etc.)

title: Phase 2: Migrate FaceRecognitionService from oneboard-widget
description: Copy and adapt FaceRecognitionService.ts and Listener.ts from temp/oneboard-widget, integrate @vladmandic/human library, ensure models path is correct

title: Phase 3: Implement React hooks layer
description: Create useCameraStream, useFaceDetection, useFacePositioning, and useFaceScanning hooks for managing face scanning workflow

title: Facility & Area Management
description: Implement facilities and areas tables (Hasura migrations + metadata), full CRUD pages for both entities, area hierarchy with self-referential parent_id, tree view on facility show page. Enums: facility status, area type, access level. See tasks/demo-dashboard-facilities-segments/specs/02-facility-area-management.md

title: Phase 4: Build UI components with shadcn/ui
description: Create FaceScanner, PositionIndicator, ScanningInstructions, and FaceScannerModal components using shadcn/ui (no Material-UI)

title: Phase 6: Update backend API to support profileId linking
description: Modify POST /api/face/detect to accept profileId query param, update identityService.findOrCreateIdentity to support skipSimilarityCheck flag for enrollment

title: Phase 8: Implement error handling and polish
description: Add error handling for camera permissions, model loading, backend service unavailable, and network errors. Add loading states and user feedback

title: Phase 1: Create face-scanner domain structure
description: Create domain folder structure (components, hooks, services, types, utils) and setup TypeScript types in apps/admin-ui/src/domains/face-scanner/

title: Segment Management with Rule Builder
description: Implement segments and segment_memberships tables (Hasura migrations + metadata), CRUD pages, visual rule builder UI (AND/OR groups, nested conditions), conditions-to-Hasura-where converter, membership management, color picker, preset templates. See tasks/demo-dashboard-facilities-segments/specs/03-segment-management.md

title: Phase 5: Integrate face scanner into Profile Edit page
description: Add 'Create Face ID' button to profile edit page, implement FaceScannerModal integration, handle onComplete callback to upload files and link identities

title: Phase 10: Documentation and cleanup
description: Add JSDoc comments to hooks and components, update CLAUDE.md with face-scanner domain info, create follow-up issues for enhancements

title: Phase 7: Build Identity Management UI in Profile page
description: Display linked face IDs in profile edit page, implement delete identity functionality, update ProfileOneQuery to fetch identities
